records.m_Talk_ENG: My guess is that the whale is attracted to me or maybe strong Counters.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My guess is that the whale is attracted to me or maybe strong Counters.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My guess is that the whale is attracted to me or maybe strong Counters.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But in my first encounter with it, it cornered me, then swallowed Asha and went back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But in my first encounter with it, it cornered me, then swallowed Asha and went back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But in my first encounter with it, it cornered me, then swallowed Asha and went back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Why did it separate me from Asha and then take her?94p
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Why did it separate me from Asha and then take her?94p
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Why did it separate me from Asha and then take her?94p

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've been waiting all this time for you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've been waiting all this time for you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've been waiting all this time for you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But why can't you remember who I am?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But why can't you remember who I am?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But why can't you remember who I am?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I told you that I'll keep on waiting...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I told you that I'll keep on waiting...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I told you that I'll keep on waiting...

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>BUT YOU NEVER CAME BACK FOR ME!!!!</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>BUT YOU NEVER CAME BACK FOR ME!!!!</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>BUT YOU NEVER CAME BACK FOR ME!!!!</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...It's not your fault, Miss Aditya.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...It's not your fault, Miss Aditya.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...It's not your fault, Miss Aditya.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm getting punished for... asking for those ridiculous requests...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm getting punished for... asking for those ridiculous requests...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm getting punished for... asking for those ridiculous requests...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I hope you find your memories.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I hope you find your memories.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I hope you find your memories.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We didn't know each other for that long, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: We didn't know each other for that long, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: We didn't know each other for that long, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Asha got hurt because I couldn't control my power.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Asha got hurt because I couldn't control my power.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Asha got hurt because I couldn't control my power.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And because of that, she...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And because of that, she...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And because of that, she...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's all my fault... So I must finish it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's all my fault... So I must finish it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's all my fault... So I must finish it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...The compass still can't point to a direction.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...The compass still can't point to a direction.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...The compass still can't point to a direction.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did Asha...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did Asha...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did Asha...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought I killed you already. So you are a Doppelganger-type, just as I thought.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought I killed you already. So you are a Doppelganger-type, just as I thought.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought I killed you already. So you are a Doppelganger-type, just as I thought.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This one doesn't seem like a talkative one.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This one doesn't seem like a talkative one.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This one doesn't seem like a talkative one.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't want to be dragged around like this anymore. I'll make a breakthrough at once.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't want to be dragged around like this anymore. I'll make a breakthrough at once.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't want to be dragged around like this anymore. I'll make a breakthrough at once.
